entity.summary: India-origin centralized cryptocurrency exchange whose public operating history began with a Bitcoin wallet launch in October 2014, expanded to a global exchange in December 2018, and returned to the Indian market in March 2020.
entity.notes: ZebPay's official timeline distinguishes the October 2014 wallet launch, December 2018 global-exchange launch, and March 2020 India relaunch. The canonical launch date is moved from year-only precision to October 2014, using the first day as a month-level marker.

expected.summary: India-based centralized exchange launched in 2014 and still operating under the ZebPay brand.

changes.summary: India-origin centralized cryptocurrency exchange whose public operating history began with a Bitcoin wallet launch in October 2014, expanded to a global exchange in December 2018, and returned to the Indian market in March 2020.
changes.notes: ZebPay's official timeline distinguishes the October 2014 wallet launch, December 2018 global-exchange launch, and March 2020 India relaunch. The canonical launch date is moved from year-only precision to October 2014, using the first day as a month-level marker.

events.title: ZebPay launched its Bitcoin wallet in October 2014
events.description: ZebPay's official company timeline identifies October 2014 as the launch of its Bitcoin wallet and the beginning of its public operating history.
events.notes: The reviewed official sources establish the month but not an exact launch day, so October 1 is used as a month-level marker.

events.title: ZebPay launched its global exchange
events.description: ZebPay launched a global cryptocurrency exchange in December 2018 as it expanded beyond its original Indian market.
events.notes: The official timeline establishes the month but not an exact day.

events.title: ZebPay relaunched in India
events.description: ZebPay returned to the Indian market in March 2020 with a new leadership team and renewed exchange services.
events.notes: The official timeline establishes March 2020 but not an exact relaunch day.

evidence.title: About ZebPay
evidence.notes: The official company timeline records the Bitcoin wallet launch in October 2014.

evidence.title: ZebPay celebrates ten years
evidence.notes: The anniversary page corroborates ZebPay's ten-year operating history beginning in 2014.

evidence.title: About ZebPay
evidence.notes: The official timeline records the global exchange launch in December 2018.

evidence.title: About ZebPay
evidence.notes: The official timeline records ZebPay's India relaunch in March 2020.

evidence.title: ZebPay official exchange
evidence.notes: The official domain verifies current ZebPay trading services and continuing operation.
